scripts.check: pnpm check:upstream-theme && pnpm --filter kumo-svelte check && pnpm --filter @kumo-svelte/docs check
scripts.format: oxfmt --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json README.md scripts packages
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json README.md scripts packages
scripts.maintenance:check: pnpm format:check && pnpm check:upstream-theme && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm docs:check && pnpm test && pnpm upstream:coverage && pnpm test:packed-consumer && pnpm docs:build
scripts.test: pnpm upstream:coverage:test && pnpm parity:proof:test && pnpm --filter kumo-svelte test
